channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI Data Centers Become Political Flashpoint
item.description: Opposition to large AI data centers is becoming a potent political issue, with Florida residents joining a growing national backlash.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: NASA Actually Doing Things Right
Grace by Which I Still Stand
Sen. Tillis Signals Support for Blanche, With Warning
item.description: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., said Sunday he is leaning toward supporting acting Attorney General Todd Blanche's nomination, but issued a warning.
